morning asset market get stocks down

perspective and guess what that's a

headlines uh short-term gain for

general theme of of the joe biden
administration not not to pick sides
politically here this is a very a
political show but it is what it is um

very similar to the uh talks around um

and things of that nature again tends to

pain but that's neither here nor there

concern obviously and the us called to
talk substantive but didn't mention
tariffs or sanctions so that's a big
deal

here reminder that the liquidity cycle

delivered another aggressive move hiking
rates by 50 bibs to one spot three five
yikes the highest since may 2019 in line
with estimates uh so that's uh just keep
in mind that we have 80 central banks a
year today have hiked interest rates
year to date um this is going to be an
issue both from a growth perspective but
also from a liquidity perspective you're
going to have a lot of investors global
investors global capital allocators
really seeing losses and looking for
pockets of liquidity and things that
have not gone down a lot uh cuff cuff uh

for the euro the guard doesn't seem like

starting to decline um you know we've

what they're all wrong um big movers

that's a 3.8 percent on a

down eight basis points a month or today
to only up 26 basis points month over

of today's pricing are very much pricing
in a significant uh downshift in growth
expectations there alongside bloomberg

percent to off 21 month over month i
mean you look at the public chart of
copper it's telling you that we're
heading into a global recession bitcoin

month over month respectively we talked
about this on the program but when
you're starting to get into these steep
declines the percentage change math
really starts to work against you in the

whenever you're in a compounding state

and probable ranges us dollar index that

bullish but you know you can lose a lot

what we're trying to do is help
investors not be long things that go
down a lot and be long of things that go
up a lot um and then we've tried to do
that consistently across you know months
quarters and you stack up those gains
you stack them up and eventually what
you have is as a positively sloped you
know curve of your net worth your your
client's net wealth um that has very
limited volatility that's what we're
trying to do we're obviously
going to go to false i have a perfect
outcome there but guess what that's what

try to at least achieve for the perfect
